title: Deliver Gate Artifact
description: Phase 55: closes pre-existing surface gap where qor-repo-release wrote phase="deliver" with no schema validation. Required fields capture the release outcome; sbom_path is the optional sidecar path emitted by qor.scripts.sbom_emit.

sbom_path.description: Phase 55: sidecar SBOM artifact path (CycloneDX 1.5 JSON). Optional; populated when qor.scripts.sbom_emit.emit() runs successfully at /qor-repo-release Step Z.
